nasb.text: Is not the whole land before you? Please separate from me; if to the left, then I will go to the right; or if to the right, then I will go to the left.”

esv.text: Is not the whole land before you? Separate yourself from me. If you take the left hand, then I will go to the right, or if you take the right hand, then I will go to the left.”

cnv.text: 全地不都是在你面前嗎？請你離開我吧！你若向左，我就向右；你若向右，我就向左。”

ccb.text: 整片土地不就在你面前吗？我们分开吧。如果你往左边去，我就往右边走；如果你往右边去，我就往左边走。”

csbs.text: 全地不都在你面前吗？请你与我分开吧。如果你向左，我就向右；如果你向右，我就向左。”
